# gigahost_dns_records (Data Source)

Lists the DNS records in a Gigahost DNS zone.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "gigahost_dns_records" "example" {
  zone_id = "2826"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `zone_id` (String) Id of the DNS zone to list records for.

### Read-Only

- `records` (Attributes List) DNS records in the zone. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--records))

<a id="nestedatt--records"></a>
### Nested Schema for `records`

Read-Only:

- `record_id` (String) Record id.
- `record_name` (String) Record name (host), e.g. "@" or "www".
- `record_priority` (Number) Priority (used by MX and SRV records).
- `record_ttl` (Number) Time to live, in seconds.
- `record_type` (String) Record type (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, NS, etc.).
- `record_value` (String) Record value (content).
